methodology: Static codebase scan (frontend route registry + Express routers) + live dev-DB introspection (information_schema + RBAC/feature/audit catalog tables). Every count is empirical, not estimated. Endpoint paths are router-relative (mount prefixes live in artifacts/api-server/src/routes/index.ts).
scope_note: STEP 1 of the 20-step exhaustive plan: the MASTER INVENTORY. Per the spec, no testing is marked done before this exists. Testing phases (2-20) consume these lists.
